title: hrabanazviking/Viking_Girlfriend_Skill_for_OpenClaw
summary: This project is an advanced, locally-hosted AI companion skill for the OpenClaw agent framework. It brings to life Sigrid, a dynamic digital entity designed with deep psychological realism, complex emotional states, and a unique "Heathen Third Path" worldview. Sigrid is built on the Ørlög Architecture.
